title: penstemon laevigatus var. digitalis
intro: Penstemon laevigatus var. digitalis, also known as the smooth penstemon or foxglove beardtongue, is a perennial plant species within the plantain family, characterized by its tall spikes of blue flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Penstemon laevigatus var. digitalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural expectorant, making it a useful remedy for various respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Penstemon laevigatus var. digitalis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of uses in natural medicine.
